guide_gk_check3_desc: When enabled, only whitelisted devices can send (strict mode)
guide_gk_check4_desc: Same device exceeds message limit in a time window — auto throttle or block
guide_gk_check5_desc: Restrict allowed message formats (text, image, voice, etc.)
guide_gk_check6_desc: Suspended devices have all messages blocked until suspension is lifted
guide_gk_tip_li1: ✅ Start with rate limiting: Default 10/min is sufficient for most scenarios
guide_gk_tip_li2: ✅ Update forbidden words regularly: Add new scam keywords as they appear
guide_gk_tip_li3: ✅ Monitor stats daily: Check the stats API to understand interception trends
guide_gk_tip_li4: ⚠️ Use whitelist carefully: When enabled, all non-whitelisted users are blocked
